title: Lucky blocks
description: Adds a variety of lucky blocks into Minecraft!
body:
# This datapack adds 5 custom lucky blocks to the game.

- First, drop an iron ingot onto a placed crafting table, that will give you the lucky block crafter.

- Next, put a wooden pickaxe into the crafter, it will enchant it with Luck I, a new custom enchantment.
- When mining coal with this Luck I pickaxe, there is a chance that you will get a lucky ore.

- Mine this lucky ore with an iron pickaxe or higher to obtain the luck essence item.
I- f you craft this in the lucky block crafter in a cross shape, with the luck essence in the middle and coal around the outside you will get a coal lucky block.

- Place this down and break to get a random item.
- Sometimes you will get a stone pickaxe enchanted with Luck II.

- Mine iron with this, and you can get more lucky ore, which drops a different kind of luck essence, which, when crafted in the same way as before but with iron ingots instead will give you an iron lucky block.

### This pattern repeats in the following order: coal, iron, gold, diamond and finally netherite.
